summary: Completed comprehensive backend testing of FORGE v8 Agent Cognition features: ① Senior-engineer system prompt (REGRESSION - chat still works), ② Plan-then-Build mode, ③ Self-critique review endpoint, ④ Agentic tool-use loop, ⑤ Per-project auto-maintained memory. All 27 v8 tests + 29 v7 regression tests passed (56 total).
critical_code_review_comments: SYSTEM_PROMPT rewrite: Chat streaming with mode='build' (default) works correctly - streams valid assistant reply and persists to messages collection
Plan mode: POST /chat/stream with mode='plan' streams SSE events, final 'done' event contains message with mode='plan', reply starts with '### Goal' per PLAN_ADDENDUM format, NO code fences in output
Build mode: POST with mode='build' produces replies that may contain code fences (as expected)
Agent mode: POST with mode='agent' streams agent_step and tool_result SSE events, write_file tool creates files in db.project_files, max 5 rounds enforced
Invalid mode fallback: ChatRequest with invalid mode (e.g. 'xyz') falls back to 'build' without error

Review endpoint: POST /review with no files returns 400 'No code to review yet', with files returns {review: string, files_reviewed: int} with review >200 chars, debits 1 credit, logs 'code.reviewed' activity
Memory GET: Returns {project_id, content:''} for new project
Memory PUT: Persists content and returns it, viewer role correctly blocked with 403
Memory injection: Memory content injected into system prompt - chat with memory doesn't 500

Agent tool parser: _parse_agent_tools regex correctly extracts <tool name='list_files' />, <tool name='read_file' path='x.js' />, <tool name='write_file' path='y.js'>content</tool>, <tool name='done' />
Agent tool executor: list_files/read_file/write_file/done all return {ok: true/false, ...}
All 29 v7 tests still pass (settings, integrations, deploys, export, presence, Stripe, activity)

success_rate.backend: 100% (27/27 v8 tests + 29/29 v7 regression tests = 56/56 total)

test_credentials.note: Test users cleaned up after testing via pytest fixture

seed_data_creation: Created test user + session + project + viewer member via mongosh for authenticated endpoint testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: v8 Agent Cognition features fully tested: (1) SYSTEM_PROMPT rewritten for principal-engineer CoT - chat streaming still works, persists messages. (2) Plan mode (mode='plan') produces plan-only output starting with '### Goal', NO code fences. (3) Build mode (mode='build') may contain code fences. (4) Agent mode (mode='agent') streams agent_step and tool_result SSE events, executes list_files/read_file/write_file/done tools, max 5 rounds enforced. (5) Review endpoint POST /review returns 400 if no files, otherwise returns {review, files_reviewed} with review >200 chars, debits 1 credit, logs 'code.reviewed' activity. (6) Memory GET returns {project_id, content:''} for new project. (7) Memory PUT persists content, viewer role blocked with 403. (8) Memory injected into system prompt - chat doesn't 500. (9) Invalid mode falls back to 'build'. (10) All v7 features (models, settings, integrations, deploys) continue to work.

backend: POST /api/projects/{id}/chat/stream mode='build' - streams valid reply, persists message (REGRESSION)
POST /api/projects/{id}/chat/stream mode='plan' - streams SSE, final message has mode='plan', starts with '### Goal', NO code fences
POST /api/projects/{id}/chat/stream mode='build' - may contain code fences
POST /api/projects/{id}/chat/stream mode='agent' - streams agent_step and tool_result events
Agent mode - write_file tool creates file in db.project_files
Agent mode - max 5 rounds enforced (doesn't loop forever)
Invalid mode 'xyz' - falls back to 'build' without error
POST /api/projects/{id}/review - no files returns 400 'No code to review yet'
POST /api/projects/{id}/review - with files returns {review: string, files_reviewed: int}
PUT /api/projects/{id}/memory - persists content and returns it
Memory injected into system prompt - chat with memory doesn't 500

mocked_apis.none: No mocking - all LLM calls are real via EMERGENT_LLM_KEY through emergentintegrations

from_previous_iterations.emergentintegrations_library_bug: get_checkout_status() fails with Pydantic validation error - checkout creation works, status polling returns 502
